mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_VOLUN_HISTORY ( USER_NO, VOLUN_TIME, VOLUN_ACT_DATE, VOLUN_ACT_TITLE, VOLUN_ACT_GET_POINT, VOLUN_ACT_ADDRESS, VOLUN_ACT_ADDRESS_DETIAL ) SELECT #{userNo}, (VOLUN_ACT_END_TIME - VOLUN_ACT_BEGIN_TIME), VOLUN_ACT_PROC_BEGIN, VOLUN_ACT_TITLE, VOLUN_ACT_POINT, VOLUN_ACT_ADDRESS, VOLUN_ACT_ADDRESS_DETAIL FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY WHERE VOLUN_ACT_NO = #{volunActNo}
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(VOLUNACT_APPLYDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS volunActApplyDate, COUNT(*) AS currentCount FROM TBL_VOLUN_APPLY WHERE VOLUN_ACT_NO = #{volunActNo} AND VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS IN (1, 9) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(VOLUNACT_APPLYDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY volunActApplyDate
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_VOLUN_APPLY WHERE VOLUN_ACT_NO = #{volunActNo} AND VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS IN (1, 9)

SELECT A.VOLUN_ACT_NO AS volunActNo, A.USER_NO AS userNo, U.USER_NAME AS userName, DATE_FORMAT(U.USER_BIRTH, '%Y.%m.%d') AS userBirth, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, U.USER_BIRTH, CURDATE()) AS userAge, DATE_FORMAT(A.VOLUNACT_APPLYDATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS volunActApplyDate, A.VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS AS volunActApplyStatus, A.VOLUNACT_ATTENDANCE AS volunActAttendance FROM TBL_VOLUN_APPLY A JOIN TBL_USER U ON A.USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE A.VOLUN_ACT_NO = #{volunActNo} AND A.VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS IN (1, 9) ORDER BY A.VOLUNACT_APPLYDATE DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO TBL_CURRENCY ( Currency_ID, User_No, Total_Amount ) VALUES ( #{currencyId}, #{userNo}, #{changeAmount} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE Total_Amount = Total_Amount + VALUES(Total_Amount)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_LOG_POINT ( USER_NO, CURRENCY_ID, CHANGE_AMOUNT, LOG_REASON, LOG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{currencyId}, #{changeAmount}, #{logReason}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY SET VOLUN_ACT_TITLE = #{volunActTitle}, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_BEGIN = #{volunActRecruBegin}, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END = #{volunActRecruEnd}, VOLUN_ACT_PROC_BEGIN = #{volunActProcBegin}, VOLUN_ACT_PROC_END = #{volunActProcEnd}, VOLUN_ACT_POINT = #{volunActPoint}, VOLUN_ACT_BEGIN_TIME = #{volunActBeginTime}, VOLUN_ACT_END_TIME = #{volunActEndTime}, VOLUN_ACT_ACT_TYPE = #{volunActActType}, VOLUN_ACT_AGE_GROUP = #{volunActAgeGroup}, VOLUN_ACT_ADDRESS = #{volunActAddress}, VOLUN_ACT_ADDRESS_DETAIL = #{volunActAddressDetail}, VOLUN_ACT_POSTNUM = #{volunActPostnum}, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_MAX_COUNT = #{volunActRecruMaxCount}, VOLUN_ACT_DETAIL = #{volunActDetail} WHERE VOLUN_ACT_NO = #{volunActNo}
mapper.select: SELECT A.VOLUN_ACT_NO AS volunActNo, A.USER_NO AS userNo, U.USER_NAME AS userName, DATE_FORMAT(U.USER_BIRTH, '%Y.%m.%d') AS userBirth, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, U.USER_BIRTH, CURDATE()) AS userAge, DATE_FORMAT(A.VOLUNACT_APPLYDATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS volunActApplyDate, A.VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS AS volunActApplyStatus, A.VOLUNACT_ATTENDANCE AS volunActAttendance FROM TBL_VOLUN_APPLY A JOIN TBL_USER U ON A.USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE A.VOLUN_ACT_NO = #{volunActNo} ORDER BY A.VOLUNACT_APPLYDATE DESC

SELECT VOLUN_ACT_NO AS volunActNo, VOLUN_ACT_TITLE AS volunActTitle, DATE_FORMAT(VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_BEGIN, '%Y-%m-%d') AS volunActRecruBegin, DATE_FORMAT(VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END, '%Y-%m-%d') AS volunActRecruEnd, DATE_FORMAT(VOLUN_ACT_PROC_BEGIN, '%Y-%m-%d') AS volunActProcBegin, DATE_FORMAT(VOLUN_ACT_PROC_END, '%Y-%m-%d') AS volunActProcEnd, VOLUN_ACT_POINT AS volunActPoint, VOLUN_ACT_BEGIN_TIME AS volunActBeginTime, VOLUN_ACT_END_TIME AS volunActEndTime, VOLUN_ACT_ACT_TYPE AS volunActActType, VOLUN_ACT_AGE_GROUP AS volunActAgeGroup, VOLUN_ACT_ORGAN_NO AS volunActOrganNo, VOLUN_ACT_ADDRESS AS volunActAddress, VOLUN_ACT_ADDRESS_DETAIL AS volunActAddressDetail, VOLUN_ACT_POSTNUM AS volunActPostnum, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_MAX_COUNT AS volunActRecruMaxCount, VOLUN_ACT_DETAIL AS volunActDetail, CASE WHEN NOW() < VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_BEGIN THEN '모집예정' WHEN NOW() < DATE_ADD(VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END, INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN '모집중' ELSE '모집마감' END AS recruStatus FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY WHERE VOLUN_ACT_NO = #{volunActNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY ( VOLUN_ACT_TITLE, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_BEGIN, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END, VOLUN_ACT_PROC_BEGIN, VOLUN_ACT_PROC_END, VOLUN_ACT_POINT, VOLUN_ACT_BEGIN_TIME, VOLUN_ACT_END_TIME, VOLUN_ACT_ACT_TYPE, VOLUN_ACT_AGE_GROUP, VOLUN_ACT_ORGAN_NO, VOLUN_ACT_ADDRESS, VOLUN_ACT_ADDRESS_DETAIL, VOLUN_ACT_POSTNUM, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_MAX_COUNT, VOLUN_ACT_DETAIL ) VALUES ( #{volunActTitle}, #{volunActRecruBegin}, #{volunActRecruEnd}, #{volunActProcBegin}, #{volunActProcEnd}, #{volunActPoint}, #{volunActBeginTime}, #{volunActEndTime}, #{volunActActType}, #{volunActAgeGroup}, #{volunActOrganNo}, #{volunActAddress}, #{volunActAddressDetail}, #{volunActPostnum}, #{volunActRecruMaxCount}, #{volunActDetail} )
